notes: Wired the toolbar ⌘R refresh action into EntryListView. The toolbar button uses Label('Refresh', systemImage: 'arrow.clockwise') with keyboardShortcut('r', modifiers: .command); tapping spawns Task { await model.refresh() }. Made EntryListModel.refresh() cooperatively cancellable: early-returns on Task.isCancelled before/after the pass-manager call and swallows CancellationError so a cancelled refresh never wipes a previously loaded snapshot. Other thrown errors still clear the snapshot (Phase 8 wires real error UI). Added KizbaTests/EntryListModelRefreshTests.swift with two deterministic tests using a local FakePassManager actor (canned responses + optional sleep delay) and Null* doubles for clipboard/settings. project.pbxproj unchanged (PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup auto-picks the new file). No changes to LivePassManager / PassCLI / PasswordStoreScanner / AppEnvironment.
commits: feat(ui): add refresh action (⌘R) to EntryListView
